spec_match.rationale: Each .grid-cell sets anchor-scope: --cell-anchor and each internal info button declares anchor-name: --cell-anchor — six cells sharing one anchor name; scope keeps the resolution local.

interactive.rationale: Native popover API on each tooltip, aria-expanded sync, six clickable info buttons each opening a distinct tooltip. CSS.supports probe + status banner.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature card promises a data grid with one info-button per cell anchored locally; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: @supports fallback, scope-status with positive / negative branch, popovertargetaction wired, ARIA states tracked.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables throughout. Same `inset-area` smell as the menu-anchor-scope concept — uses `inset-area: block-start span-inline-end` rather than the (renamed) `position-area`.

openQuestions.title: Use position-area, not inset-area
openQuestions.detail: v131 deprecates inset-area in favour of position-area (sibling feature in this milestone). Update the .cell-tooltip rule to use position-area as the primary, inset-area as a fallback.

openQuestions.title: Show the without-scope failure
openQuestions.detail: The page only shows the working case. Add a toggle to disable anchor-scope and let the visitor watch every tooltip collapse onto the last cell's button.

summary: Strong, well-instrumented grid demo with real popovers and feature-detection. Uses the renamed-in-v131 `inset-area` keyword and never shows the failing case the spec exists to fix.
